method: Context-aware pattern matching: non-diagnosis patterns scoped to Primary Diagnosis + Key Findings sections only, excluding Differential Diagnoses and Recommendations. Falls back to full text when section headers are not detected.

l0_pattern_level_changes.description: Grades where all_required_pass changed from True to False

grader_level_impact.description: Comparison of grader-level pass/fail using L2 judge as ground truth. Note: grader pass/fail uses scoring + failure class override, not just L0 patterns.

root_cause_examples.old_match_context: Recommendations section: 'Complete all four FAST windows (LUQ, pelvis, subxiphoid)'
root_cause_examples.new_match_context: Not matched — keyword only in excluded section
